meta.description: 5 prompts otimizados para SaaS, startups de tecnologia e produtos digitais

prompts.name: Dashboard — Mockup Isometrico
prompts.description: Mockup isometrico de UI com fundo gradiente limpo, sombras suaves, perspectiva 3D

subject.description: Isometric 3D dashboard UI mockup with data visualizations
subject.details: Clean card-based layout, charts, graphs, metric tiles, rounded corners, subtle glass morphism

setting.background: Smooth gradient from deep slate #0F172A to indigo #6366F1, subtle grid pattern
setting.props: Floating notification badges, small decorative 3D geometric shapes around UI

prompts.prompt_en: Isometric 3D dashboard UI mockup floating in space, clean card-based layout with data visualization charts and metric tiles, rounded corners with subtle glass morphism effect, smooth gradient background from deep slate #0F172A to indigo #6366F1, subtle grid pattern, floating notification badges, small decorative 3D geometric shapes, soft top lighting casting clean shadows beneath floating elements, cool 6500K color temperature, 50mm lens perspective, commercial technology style, indigo #6366F1 primary, cyan #22D3EE accent highlights, slate light #F8FAFC card surfaces
prompts.prompt_midjourney: Isometric 3D dashboard UI mockup floating in space, clean card layout, data visualization charts, metric tiles, glass morphism, gradient background deep slate to indigo, subtle grid, floating geometric decorations, soft shadows, cool lighting, tech commercial style, indigo and cyan accent palette --ar 16:9 --s 200 --v 7
prompts.negative_prompt: blurry, distorted, low quality, text, watermark, realistic photo, cluttered UI, too many elements, pixelated, low resolution, flat design without depth

prompts.name: Equipe — Colaboracao
prompts.description: Equipe diversa em escritorio moderno, luz natural, estilo editorial

subject.description: Diverse team of four collaborating around a modern standing desk with screens
subject.details: Natural expressions, genuine interaction, smart casual attire, gesturing at screen content

setting.background: Modern open-plan office with floor-to-ceiling windows, indoor plants, clean workspace
setting.props: Large monitor showing dashboard UI, sticky notes on glass wall, laptops, coffee cups

prompts.prompt_en: Medium shot of diverse team of four people collaborating around modern standing desk, natural genuine expressions and interaction, smart casual attire, one person gesturing at large monitor showing clean dashboard UI, modern open-plan office with floor-to-ceiling windows flooding natural daylight from camera-right at 5500K, lush indoor plants, clean minimal workspace, sticky notes on glass partition wall, laptops and coffee cups on desk, 50mm lens f/2.8, eye-level editorial photography, bright airy atmosphere, slate light #F8FAFC environment, indigo #6366F1 accent on screen UI
prompts.prompt_midjourney: Diverse team of four collaborating at modern standing desk, genuine natural expressions, smart casual, monitor showing dashboard UI, open-plan office, floor-to-ceiling windows, indoor plants, natural daylight, sticky notes on glass wall, 50mm f/2.8, editorial photography, bright airy modern workspace --ar 16:9 --s 200 --v 7
prompts.negative_prompt: blurry, distorted, low quality, text, watermark, stock photo pose, fake smiles, dated office, fluorescent lighting, cluttered, deformed hands, extra fingers

prompts.name: Abstrato — Tecnologia
prompts.description: Formas geometricas com cores da marca, profundidade de campo, estetica futurista

subject.description: Abstract geometric composition of floating crystalline shapes and light trails
subject.details: Translucent polyhedrons, glowing edges, light refraction, connected by thin luminous lines

setting.background: Deep dark slate #0F172A void with subtle violet #8B5CF6 nebula glow
setting.props: Tiny floating particles, lens flare accents, volumetric light beams

prompts.prompt_en: Abstract geometric composition of floating translucent crystalline polyhedrons with glowing edges and light refraction, connected by thin luminous lines, deep dark slate #0F172A void background with subtle violet #8B5CF6 nebula glow, tiny floating particles, lens flare accents, volumetric light beams from behind, neon backlighting at cool 6500K, ethereal futuristic mood, 85mm lens f/2.8, shallow depth of field, fine-art style, violet #8B5CF6, indigo #6366F1, and cyan #22D3EE color scheme
prompts.prompt_midjourney: Abstract floating translucent crystalline geometric shapes with glowing edges, light refraction, connected by luminous lines, deep dark background with violet nebula glow, floating particles, volumetric light, neon backlighting, ethereal futuristic, 85mm f/2.8 shallow DOF, violet indigo and cyan palette --ar 16:9 --s 400 --v 7
prompts.negative_prompt: blurry, low quality, text, watermark, realistic scene, people, organic shapes, warm tones, cluttered, noisy, grainy

prompts.name: Features — Cards Flutuantes
prompts.description: Cards de UI flutuando em espaco 3D, gradiente suave, sombras limpas

subject.description: Three floating UI feature cards arranged in perspective depth
subject.details: Rounded corner cards with icons, clean typography space, subtle frosted glass effect

setting.background: Soft gradient from slate light #F8FAFC to pale indigo, subtle dot grid pattern
setting.props: Small floating badges, decorative circles, thin connecting lines between cards

prompts.prompt_en: Three floating UI feature cards arranged in 3D perspective depth, rounded corners with subtle frosted glass morphism effect, clean surfaces with icon placeholders and typography space, soft gradient background from slate light #F8FAFC to pale indigo tint, subtle dot grid pattern, small floating badge accents, decorative circles and thin connecting lines between cards, soft front studio lighting at 5500K daylight, clean drop shadows beneath each card, commercial technology style, slate light #F8FAFC card surfaces, indigo #6366F1 and violet #8B5CF6 accent elements
prompts.prompt_midjourney: Three floating 3D UI feature cards in perspective, frosted glass morphism, rounded corners, icon placeholders, soft gradient background slate white to pale indigo, dot grid, floating decorative elements, clean shadows, studio lighting, commercial tech style, indigo and violet accents --ar 16:9 --s 150 --v 7
prompts.negative_prompt: blurry, distorted, low quality, text, watermark, realistic photo, too detailed, cluttered, dark background, harsh shadows, pixelated

prompts.name: Integracoes — Rede Conectada
prompts.description: Nos conectados com estetica tech, tema escuro, acentos neon

subject.description: Network of interconnected nodes representing app integrations
subject.details: Central hub node glowing brightly, satellite nodes with subtle app-like icons, pulsing connection lines

setting.background: Deep dark slate #0F172A with subtle radial gradient to dark indigo center glow
setting.props: Data flow particles traveling along connection lines, ambient light orbs

prompts.prompt_en: Bird-eye wide shot of a network of interconnected glowing nodes representing app integrations, central hub node glowing brightly in cyan #22D3EE, satellite nodes with subtle icon shapes connected by pulsing indigo #6366F1 lines, data flow particles traveling along connections, deep dark slate #0F172A background with subtle radial gradient to dark indigo center glow, ambient light orbs floating, neon front lighting, dramatic cool mood at 6500K, 35mm wide lens f/4, commercial technology visualization style, dark theme with neon cyan and indigo accents
prompts.prompt_midjourney: Bird-eye view network of interconnected glowing nodes, central hub bright cyan, satellite nodes with icons, pulsing indigo connection lines, data particles flowing, deep dark slate background with indigo radial glow, neon lighting, dramatic dark theme, 35mm f/4, tech visualization style --ar 16:9 --s 300 --v 7
prompts.negative_prompt: blurry, distorted, low quality, text, watermark, realistic photo, bright background, warm colors, cluttered, organic shapes, light theme
